mapper.sql: DeptNo, DeptDesc, Address, PostCode, TeleNo, FaxNo, EmailAddr, RelaCode, FilePath, StateFlag, StockCode, LocationNo, SuperIntendent, InsidePsn, UpdDate, EmailAddr1, InvFlag, PostAddress, Bank, AccountNo, TaxNo, KFangID, YGid, SHid, DlvFlag, InvAmount, EmpInvoice, DlvFlag_Bj, DlvFlag_CN, EmpDelivery, DeptInvNo, FeeCode, SampleOrdNo, DlvEntire_Flag, DeptLevel, EmpOrdProcess, StateCode, Email_Sample, AreaCode, SupDeptNo, QPrice_Answer, DepartCode, Cust_Answer, OrganizationId, IntegrateSPS, AdministrativeStateFlag, TradeCompanyId
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.department_BJ
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.department_BJ (DeptNo, DeptDesc, Address, PostCode, TeleNo, FaxNo, EmailAddr, RelaCode, FilePath, StateFlag, StockCode, LocationNo, SuperIntendent, InsidePsn, UpdDate, EmailAddr1, InvFlag, PostAddress, Bank, AccountNo, TaxNo, KFangID, YGid, SHid, DlvFlag, InvAmount, EmpInvoice, DlvFlag_Bj, DlvFlag_CN, EmpDelivery, DeptInvNo, FeeCode, SampleOrdNo, DlvEntire_Flag, DeptLevel, EmpOrdProcess, StateCode, Email_Sample, AreaCode, SupDeptNo, QPrice_Answer, DepartCode, Cust_Answer, OrganizationId, IntegrateSPS, AdministrativeStateFlag, TradeCompanyId ) values (#{deptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptdesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{postcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{teleno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{faxno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{emailaddr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{relacode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{filepath,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stateflag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stockcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{locationno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, mapper.update:
update dbo.department_BJ
DeptNo = #{record.deptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DeptDesc = #{record.deptdesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Address = #{record.address,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PostCode = #{record.postcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TeleNo = #{record.teleno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
FaxNo = #{record.faxno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
EmailAddr = #{record.emailaddr,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RelaCode = #{record.relacode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
FilePath = #{record.filepath,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
StateFlag = #{record.stateflag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
StockCode = #{record.stockcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LocationNo = #{record.locationno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SuperIntendent = #{record.superintendent,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
InsidePsn = #{record.insidepsn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UpdDate = #{record.upddate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
EmailAddr1 = #{record.emailaddr1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
InvFlag = #{record.invflag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PostAddress = #{record.postaddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Bank = #{record.bank,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
AccountNo = #{record.accountno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TaxNo = #{record.taxno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
KFangID = #{record.kfangid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
YGid = #{record.ygid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SHid = #{record.shid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DlvFlag = #{record.dlvflag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
InvAmount = #{record.invamount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
EmpInvoice = #{record.empinvoice,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DlvFlag_Bj = #{record.dlvflagBj,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DlvFlag_CN = #{record.dlvflagCn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
EmpDelivery = #{record.empdelivery,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DeptInvNo = #{record.deptinvno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
FeeCode = #{record.feecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SampleOrdNo = #{record.sampleordno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DlvEntire_Flag = #{record.dlventireFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DeptLevel = #{record.deptlevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
EmpOrdProcess = #{record.empordprocess,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
StateCode = #{record.statecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Email_Sample = #{record.emailSample,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
AreaCode = #{record.areacode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SupDeptNo = #{record.supdeptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
QPrice_Answer = #{record.qpriceAnswer,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DepartCode = #{record.departcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Cust_Answer = #{record.custAnswer,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OrganizationId = #{record.organizationid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IntegrateSPS = #{record.integratesps,jdbcType=BIT},
AdministrativeStateFlag = #{record.administrativestateflag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TradeCompanyId = #{record.tradecompanyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
